title: Unique Springy Portuguese Chicken Skewers
description: Savory Portuguese chicken skewers featuring almond essence, perfect for a date night, with a springy twist and sugar-free friendly ingredients. This dish is a great option for those looking for a flavorful and healthy meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, almond essence, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, add a bay leaf to each skewer.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional bay leaves if desired.
